Settings.title: Profile & Settings
Settings.subtitle: Your data is encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM.
Settings.personalInfoDesc: This information is used for eligibility checks. It is never exposed in plaintext.
Settings.profileSavedDesc: Your data is encrypted and stored securely.

Marketing.heroSubtitle: Every day, thousands miss out on life-changing scholarships and schemes because of confusing PDFs and missed deadlines. FormMitra is your AI copilot that proves your eligibility and builds your action plan before it's too late.
Marketing.ctaTitle: Your next big opportunity is expiring soon.
Marketing.ctaSubtitle: Don't let bureaucracy stand in your way. Secure your profile today and let the AI handle the heavy lifting.
Marketing.step1Desc: Securely upload your IDs, certificates, and resumes to your encrypted vault.
Marketing.step2Desc: Paste a link or upload a PDF of the scholarship, internship, or scheme.
Marketing.step3Desc: The AI reasons through the requirements and tells you exactly where you stand.
Marketing.step4Desc: Follow the prioritized checklist to close gaps and submit your application.
Marketing.feature1Desc: Stop searching for lost documents. Securely store your Aadhaar, PAN, and marksheets locally encrypted. Upload once, reuse for life.
Marketing.feature2Desc: Stop wasting hours reading legal jargon. Our AI cross-references your profile against strict application requirements to give you a definitive Yes/No in seconds.
Marketing.feature3Desc: Turn overwhelming applications into a simple, prioritized checklist. We actively track your missing documents and alert you before critical deadlines hit.
Marketing.feature4Desc: Have a PDF? Upload it. Have a website link? Paste it. FormMitra's crawler instantly extracts exactly what you need to know from any source.
